description: Create a two-column content slide on luxury hotel drivers with a left-side headline and KPI/text callouts and a right-side horizontal bar chart showing what makes a property luxurious.

header.headline: Room comfort and service stand out as leading hallmarks of luxury, while perceptions of other drivers are more fragmented

items.sub: of summer 2026 travelers plan luxury stays sometime this year

items.text: Luxury travelers turn to gen AI for trip research at twice the rate of other travelers, and are also bigger users of social media and short video content in trip planning (1.3X)

right.title: What makes a property luxurious? Percentage of luxury travelers selecting the top two attributes contributing to property luxuriousness

center.body: For travelers at the highest income level, service is a defining element of luxury—51% of those with household income over $300,000 selected it in their top two.
